hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
SELECT rnp.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS "idReglaNegocio", rnp.ID_PROGRAMACION AS "idProgramacion", rnp.ID_TIPO_PROGRAMACION AS "idTipoProgramacion", rnp.NOMBRE AS "nombre", rnp.DESCRIPCION AS "descripcion", rnp.ID_FRECUENCIA_PROGRAMACION AS "idFrecuenciaProgramacion", rnp.FECHA_ULTIMA_EJECUCION AS "fechaUltimaEjecucion", rnp.FLG_EJECUTANDO_ACTUALMENTE AS "flgEjecutandoActualmente", rnp.DIA_CADA_N_DIAS AS "diaCadaNDias", rnp.DIA_ID_FRECUENCIA AS "diaIdFrecuencia", rnp.DIA_FREC_UNICA_HORAEJECUCION AS "diaFrecUnicaHoraejecucion", rnp.DIA_FREC_RANGO_CADAN AS "diaFrecRangoCadan", rnp.DIA_FREC_RANGO_ID_FRECU_TIEMPO AS "diaFrecRangoIdFrecuTiempo", rnp.DIA_FREC_RANGO_HORAINICIO AS "diaFrecRangoHorainicio", rnp.DIA_FREC_RANGO_HORAFIN AS "diaFrecRangoHorafin", rnp.DIA_FECHA_INICIO AS "diaFechaInicio", rnp.DIA_FLG_TIENE_FIN AS "diaFlgTieneFin", rnp.DIA_FECHA_FIN AS "diaFechaFin", rnp.SEM_CADA_N_SEMANAS AS "semCadaNSemanas", rnp.SEM_FLG_EJECUTAR_LUNES AS "semFlgEjecutarLunes", rnp.SEM_FLG_EJECUTAR_MARTES AS "semFlgEjecutarMartes", rnp.SEM_FLG_EJECUTAR_MIERCOLES AS "semFlgEjecutarMiercoles", rnp.SEM_FLG_EJECUTAR_JUEVES AS "semFlgEjecutarJueves", rnp.SEM_FLG_EJECUTAR_VIERNES AS "semFlgEjecutarViernes", rnp.SEM_FLG_EJECUTAR_SABADO AS "semFlgEjecutarSabado", rnp.SEM_FLG_EJECUTAR_DOMINGO AS "semFlgEjecutarDomingo", rnp.SEM_ID_FRECUENCIA AS "semIdFrecuencia", rnp.SEM_FREC_UNICA_HORAEJECUCION AS "semFrecUnicaHoraejecucion",
rnp.SEM_FECHA_INICIO AS "semFechaInicio", rnp.SEM_FLG_TIENE_FIN AS "semFlgTieneFin", rnp.SEM_FECHA_FIN AS "semFechaFin", rnp.MES_ID_FRECUENCIA_MENSUAL AS "mesIdFrecuenciaMensual", rnp.MES_FREC_DIA_DIA AS "mesFrecDiaDia", rnp.MES_FREC_DIA_CADAN AS "mesFrecDiaCadan",
rnp.MES_ID_FRECUENCIA AS "mesIdFrecuencia", rnp.MES_FREC_UNICA_HORAEJECUCION AS "mesFrecUnicaHoraejecucion",
rnp.MES_FECHA_INICIO AS "mesFechaInicio", rnp.MES_FLG_TIENE_FIN AS "mesFlgTieneFin", rnp.ESTADO AS "estado", rnp.CREACION_USUARIO AS "creacionUsuario", rnp.CREACION_FECHA AS "creacionFecha", rnp.CREACION_TERMINAL AS "creacionTerminal", rnp.MODIFICACION_USUARIO AS "modificacionUsuario", rnp.MODIFICACION_FECHA AS "modificacionFecha", rnp.MODIFICACION_TERMINAL AS "modificacionTerminal",
case WHEN rnp.ESTADO = 'A' THEN 'Activo' WHEN rnp.ESTADO = 'I' THEN 'Inactivo' END AS "estadoaux"
FROM SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO_PROGRAMACION rnp with (nolock) WHERE rnp.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = :p_regla

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO_PROGRAMACION rnp with (nolock) WHERE rnp.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = :p_regla
